name: Pierogi Fillings, Sauerkraut
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Diced bacon (optional) or 1/2 lb Diced salt pork (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse sauerkraut and drain well.
2. In a covered pan, cook the sauerkraut with onions over low heat for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add butter, bacon or salt pork, salt, pepper, sugar (and mushrooms if desired).
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
